prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约5906→7685→13601→15363→17051名，呈持续大幅后移趋势，近4年累计后移约11145名；2025年基准约17051名，后移速度近年有 所放缓但仍未止跌；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为45、47、43、45、47人，略有波动；2026年计划47人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩 招，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第57名，近年排名稳定在第47–57区间，属中上层次财经类院校；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A、工商管理获评A、外国语言文学获评A-，三个A类学科均 为财经类核心领域，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉文件中未出现对外经济贸易大学的显著声誉事件，整体舆情平稳；抖音综合热度排名第91位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未见明 显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中亦无该校断档记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度指数76.86，评估为"高热推荐"；电气工程及其自动化热度指数74.2 8，评估为"高热推荐"；计算机类热度指数67.8，评估为"推荐"——这些理工科热门专业与该校财经特色关联度较低，对物理类考生吸引力有限。广东省2026年物理类考生约456000 人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，考生规模小幅扩大，竞争略有加剧；省控线数据已纳入参考，2025年物理类本科批436分，近年呈波动下降趋势；该校位于 北京，属跨省招生；广东省在对外经济贸易大学全国招生中占比约3–4%（2025年历史类+物理类合计约85人），非该校主要生源地，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合历年位次持续大幅后移趋势（近4年后移超1.1万名）、2026年物理类考生小幅增加约3.6%（竞争略加剧）、招生计划持平（无扩招缓解）、学校声誉平稳、理工科热门专业与该 校财经特色匹配度低等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年17051名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约17081名，区间16581–17581名。

- 金融工程（量化金融实验班）
- 海关管理（海关与大数据应用拔尖人才实验班）
- 金融工程（大类招生）（含金融工程、金融科技，北邮人工智能联合学士学位培养项目）
- 统计学。

- 法学类（法学，可参与法学-大数据专业双学士学位项目或涉外型卓越经贸法律人才实验班选拔）
- 金融数学
- 金融学类（金融学、金融学（国际金融与市场）、经济与金融、投资学、保险学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间16581–17581名内，建议以二档专业（数据科学、数据科学与大数据技术、金融数学、金融学类）为主攻方向，一档专业（量化金融实验班、海关管理实验班、统 计学）作为冲刺，三档专业（精算学、工商管理类、经济学类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（如16581名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5906 → 7685 → 13601 → 15363 → 17051, showing a continuous and significant downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 11,145 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 17,051, and the rate of decline has slowed in recent years but has not yet stopped; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong from 2021 to 2025 was 45, 47, 43, 45, and 47 students respectively, with slight fluctuations; the 2026 plan is 47 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 47–57 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of finance and economics institutions; in the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Applied Economics was rated A, Business Administration was rated A, and Foreign Languages and Literature was rated A-, all three A-level disciplines being core areas of finance and economics, strongly attracting applicants to related majors; no significant reputation events concerning the University of International Business and Economics appeared in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation documents, with overall public opinion stable; ranked 91st in Douyin comprehensive popularity, rated as "average", with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; there are no records of historical admission anomalies such as gaps for this university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Electronic Information/Communication majors was 76.86, assessed as "highly recommended"; for Electrical Engineering and Automation, it was 74.28, assessed as "highly recommended"; for Computer Science majors, it was 67.8, assessed as "recommended"—these popular science and engineering majors have low relevance to the university's finance and economics characteristics, thus having limited appeal to Physics Category candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, indicating a slight expansion in candidate numbers and a slight intensification of competition; provincial control score data has been included for reference, with the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score at 436, showing a fluctuating downward trend in recent years; the university is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment; Guangdong accounts for about 3–4% of the university's national enrollment (approximately 85 students in total for History and Physics categories in 2025), not being a major source of students, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant downward trend in historical rankings (a decline of over 11,000 places in the past 4 years), a slight increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in 2026 (slightly intensifying competition), unchanged enrollment plan (no expansion to alleviate competition), stable university reputation, and low alignment between popular science and engineering majors and the university's finance and economics characteristics, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to decline slightly from the 2025 baseline of 17,051. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17,081, with a range of 16,581–17,581.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Financial Engineering (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class)
- Customs Administration (Customs and Big Data Application Top Talent Experimental Class)
- Financial Engineering (Major Category Enrollment) (including Financial Engineering, Financial Technology, Joint Bachelor's Degree Training Program with BUPT Artificial Intelligence)
- Statistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Data Science
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Major Category Enrollment) (including Data Science and Big Data Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Law Category (Law, can participate in Law-Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program or International Outstanding Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class selection)
- Financial Mathematics
- Finance Category (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Actuarial Science (can participate in Actuarial Science-Labor and Social Security Dual Bachelor's Degree Program, Actuarial and Risk Management Experimental Class selection)
- Business Administration Category (Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration, can participate in Accounting and BUPT Computer/Financial Technology Joint Bachelor's Degree Program selection)
- Economics Category (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16,581–17,581, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Data Science, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Financial Mathematics, Finance Category) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class, Customs Administration Experimental Class, Statistics) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Actuarial Science, Business Administration Category, Economics Category) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 16,581), it is advisable to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1277 → 1690 → 1977 → 2385 → 2245, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 968 positions in the past 4 years; in 2025, there was a slight rebound compared to 2024 (2385 → 2245), but it remains in the high range of recent years, with the 2025 baseline around 2245; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong from 2021 to 2025 was 37, 37, 38, 38, 38 students respectively, basically stable; in 2026, the plan increases to 39 students, a small expansion of about 2.6% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 47–57 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of finance and economics institutions; no significant reputation events related to the University of International Business and Economics appeared in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation documents, with overall public opinion stable; ranked 91st in Douyin comprehensive popularity, rated as 'average', with exposure on short video platforms at a medium-low level, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention; no record of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A, Business Administration rated A, and Foreign Language and Literature rated A-, with all three A-level disciplines being core areas in finance and economics, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Finance/Economics/Economic majors was 65.49, assessed as 'divergent wait-and-see', with a clear cooling from the 2021 recommendation (72.42) to a divergent state; the popularity index for Law was 63.54, assessed as 'divergent wait-and-see'; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong is about 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; provincial control line data has been included for reference, with the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch line at 464 points, showing a fluctuating upward trend in recent years; the university is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment; Guangdong accounts for about 3–4% of the University of International Business and Economics' national enrollment (approximately 85 students in History + Physics categories in 2025), not a major source of students for the university, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, a significant increase of about 11.6% in History Category examinees in 2026 (main factor intensifying competition), only a small enrollment expansion of 2.6% (limited relief), stable university reputation with no significant positive/negative factors, and divergent wait-and-see popularity of finance and economics majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 2245. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2300, with a range of 1886–2714.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Customs Management (Customs and Big Data Application Top Talent Experimental Class)
- Law Category (Law, eligible for selection into Law-Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program or International Outstanding Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class)
- International Economics and Trade (International Organization Talent Base Class) (International Economics and Trade-Law Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Economics Category (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation)
- Finance Category (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance)
- International Economic Development Cooperation
- Supply Chain Management (all entering the Finance Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Language and Literature Category (Business English, Translation, English, eligible for selection into English-Finance/Law/Accounting Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Business Administration Category (Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration, eligible for selection into Accounting-Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications Computer Science/Financial Technology Joint Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1886–2714, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics Category, Finance Category) as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors (Customs Management Experimental Class, Law Category, International Economics and Trade Base Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Foreign Language and Literature Category, Business Administration Category) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 1886), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
